raw_response:
{
  "communicative_function": "Stoic philosophical observation equating long and short spans to foster equanimity toward duration and mortality",
  "implicit_claims": ["All durations ultimately terminate in the same state or dissolution", "Length of time confers no distinct final significance or residue"],
  "coherence_assessment": "Coherent within a monistic cosmology where endpoints erase distinctions, though relies on an undefined 'effect' that may vary by metaphysical assumption",
  "conditions_for_usefulness": "Reader accepts a unified cosmic or existential terminus and seeks relief from attachment to longevity or brevity",
  "conditions_for_misleading": "If durations produce materially or ethically distinct outcomes (e.g., accumulated virtue, knowledge, or harm) before termination"
}
